bestBets.overview: Perhaps a low level Soft track for Rosehill's big day. Rain was expected on Thursday (plenty off the coast on Wednesday) which could have us starting a 5 perhaps. Rail out two metres throughout. Five G1s later but we kick off with a Midway over the George Ryder distance. 3 and 7 could lead 5 and 13. BELLA KHADIJAH will be settling at the opposite end but looks well placed for a 3rd-up score. SATNESS has his 20th Midway start and has run unplaced in most of them. He did one back in September of 2023 but I can see Hyeronimus controlling this to a fair extent. DUSTY BAY plummets in class but have we seen enough to be confident about him?

raceTips.comment: Tough race to assess with confidence with many in the field having the required form to figure in the finish, have settled on the Tracey Bartley trained Titanium Miss now at peak fitness this preparation after hitting the line well when winning over 1300m last start, strips fitter now and gets in very well at the weights after the 3kg claim. My Phar Lady hit the line strongly over 1400m last start and is now at peak fitness this preparation, maps perfectly and the slight step up in distance suits. Kingston Charm & Tenderize bring the required last start form into the race and with improvement between runs will  both figure in the finish.

formRaceEntries.comment: Been well held in two runs back. Fitter/further are pluses and open to improvement in Midway company. Races closer?

bestBets.overview: Been well held in two runs back. Fitter/further are pluses and open to improvement in Midway company. Races closer?
